entity: BBR source abbreviation MNL (Minneapolis Lakers) is the same franchise as warehouse canonical LAL (Los Angeles Lakers); the franchise relocated from Minneapolis (1949) to Los Angeles (1960)

query_target.sql: SELECT (SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) FROM dim_team WHERE team_id = '1610612747' AND city = 'Minneapolis' AND abbreviation = 'LAL') AS mnl_row_count, (SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) FROM dim_team WHERE team_id = '1610612747' AND city = 'Los Angeles' AND abbreviation = 'LAL') AS lal_row_count

notes: Both cities share team_id 1610612747 in dim_team, confirming the same franchise continued across the 1960 relocation. CAST(... AS INTEGER) keeps the count as a JSON number (not BIGINT-as-string) so objectMatching compares cleanly.
